Ad Text:
We are looking for a Senior Engineer to join an Australian company renowned for innovation and commitment to data-driven decision-making.

It is an exciting time to be part of the team as they continue to invest in advanced analytics capabilities and cutting-edge data solutions.

This is an opportunity to work with a complex yet exciting data platform in an environment where everyone is hands on and able to make a tangible impact without unnecessary red tape.

Responsibilities will include:

Designing, building & maintaining robust data pipelines in AWS
Collaborating with data scientists, analysts and business stakeholders to understand data requirements and deliver solutions
Implementing and optimising ETL/ELT processes and workflows for structured and unstructured data
Contributing to the design and evolution of cloud-based data architecture
Ensuring data quality, integrity and security across all platforms
Skills we are looking for:

5+ years of Data Engineering experience including designing integrations, building pipelines, data ingestion, orchestration & tooling 
Hands on experience with AWS services
Knowledge of ETL best practices and handling structured/unstructured data
Skilled in Python, SQL
Good knowledge of databases
Understanding of data security, governance, and compliance in cloud environments (with AWS experience preferred)
Good knowledge of CI/CD, containerisation, version control systems
Passion for solving complex problems and building scalable, efficient data solutions
Excellent communication skills with an ability to translate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
